# CWE-1230 positive: leaks document metadata (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1230-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1230: Exposure of Sensitive Information Through Metadata.
// Vulnerable: redacted download still returns original filename and byte length.

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

func DownloadRedactedPure() http.HandlerFunc {
	base := "/var/vault/documents"
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		name := r.URL.Query().Get("name")
		path := filepath.Join(base, name)
		info, err := os.Stat(path)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, "missing", http.StatusNotFound)
			return
		}
		w.Header().Set("X-Original-Name", name)
		w.Header().Set("X-File-Size", fmt.Sprintf("%d", info.Size()))
		w.Write([]byte("[REDACTED CONTENT]"))
	}
}
